---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for anima-prompt-helper
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you are requesting.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what improvement does it bring?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature in detail. Include UI/UX changes, new node inputs/outputs, or API changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Environment (if relevant)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| ComfyUI version | <!-- e.g. 0.3.12 --> |
| anima-prompt-helper version | <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 --> |
| OS | <!-- e.g. Windows 11 --> |

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references that support the request.
